sections.paragraph:
ἐπάρχειος, ον pert. to being governed by an ἔπαρχος or prefect, provincial ἡ ἐπάρχειος (sc. χώρα) province (s. prec. entry; OGI 549, 2; IG XIV, 911): ἐπιβὰς τῇ ἐ. after he had arrived in the province Ac 25:1 v.l. (s. ἐπαρχεία).

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

  1. sc. = scilicet (one may understand, supply)

prec. prec. = preceding

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 359
